configurations.name: ReliefLink: Full Stack Dev (All Services + Web)
configurations.preLaunchTask: ReliefLink: Prepare Dev (Tooling + Install + Generate + Migrate)
configurations.command: zsh -lc 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a && source .env && set +a; fi; if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm dev; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm dev; else echo "pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack." && exit 1; fi'

configurations.name: ReliefLink: Web Dev Only
configurations.command: zsh -lc 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a && source .env && set +a; fi; if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm dev:web; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm dev:web; else echo "pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack." && exit 1; fi'

configurations.name: ReliefLink: Build All
configurations.command: zsh -lc 'if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm build; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm build; else echo "pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack." && exit 1; fi'

configurations.name: ReliefLink: Smoke API
configurations.command: zsh -lc 'if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm test:api-smoke; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm test:api-smoke; else echo "pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack." && exit 1; fi'

configurations.name: ReliefLink: Smoke UI
configurations.command: zsh -lc 'if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm test:ui-smoke; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack pnpm test:ui-smoke; else echo "pnpm is not installed. Install pnpm or enable corepack." && exit 1; fi'
